dc_description: A wide rural landscape under a clear blue sky. The foreground contains dry grasses and shrubs in shadow, with a chain-link fence running horizontally across the frame and several dark green fence posts. Beyond the fence is a large golden-brown field with scattered round hay bales. In the distance are low farm buildings, clusters of trees, and a faint horizon line.
novel_visual_observations: The sky occupies more than half of the image, creating a strong contrast with the dry yellow field. A few umbrella-shaped trees stand isolated on the horizon, especially one prominent tree near the right side.
location_name: Via del Pavone, Campagnano di Roma
rich_context: Via del Pavone, Campagnano di Roma, Roma Capitale, Lazio, 00063, Italia
